pages.raw_text:
Captain w. c. Dutton, interna-
tional lecturer for the l. o. G.. T..
and one of the noted temperance
speakers of the country, will speak
tonight at S10R Riverside under
the auspices of Svea lodge. Thurs
day evening he will speak at Min
nehaha hall and he may decide to
hold a series of meetings in this
city as he has elsewhere. His mis-
sion Is to arouse interest in tenn
perance work generally and revive
the Good Templar lodges. There
are three branches of the order in
this city.


The Good Templar grand lodge
of this state will meet in Everett
July 90 August Cedercrans of the
state executive committee and
Julia Brady, superintendent of
Minnehaha junior lodge, the ban
ner lodge of the state, Will attend,
with other delegates.
